title: Check for duplicate names when generating new container and pod names.
body:
This fixes the situation where we fail to create a container when a name already exists.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: The change LGTM, but the tests are not at all happy.
LGTM, i was going to suggest a unittest but after looking, i'm not sure what youd test for other than getting a valid string name back from name generator ... and thats nothing new.
@mheon Lets approve this and get it merged.

:pushpin: Commit f3a666e has been approved by `baude`
